rationale: The cited provision governs dedication of state sales and use tax revenue to the Texas Water Fund. It does not address residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: the comptroller of public accounts shall deposit to the credit of the Texas water fund the first $1 billion of the net revenue derived from the imposition of the state sales and use tax
_note: No conflict; the cited constitutional provision is unrelated to homestead exemption levels. The rule_cite appears mismatched to the proposed_change.
